experimental_design: quantification of IGF–I, IGF–II, IGFBP–3 and IGFBP–5 in feline sera
The aim of this study was to set up a targeted mass spectrometry method for quantification
factor_value: quantification of IGF–I, IGF–II, IGFBP–3 and IGFBP–5

number_of_samples: 7 cats described, and 3 fractions were analyzed
